title: Fix plugin game-init bootstrap (hotkeys dead + tracking crash)

description: honse-services: register present frame source in init() (not
notes: honse-services init.rs: install_frame_source() now called directly from init() (not deferred); added GAME_READY flag, ON_GAME_READY listener list, register_on_game_ready(), poll_bootstrap() fired from present_trampoline on first present where umamusume.dll resolves. Build+clippy+test green

description: honse-services view_hook: replace un-chainable ChangeView se
notes: view_hook.rs rewritten: dropped un-chainable ChangeView self-hook; install_view_poll() resolves SceneManager.GetCurrentViewId (0-arg i32, from edge SceneManager.rs); poll_view_change() diffs per present tick and dispatch_view_change on change. Unit test for edge-triggered change logic
tracker entry.rs + race-hud lib.rs: register_on_game_initialized -> honse_services::register_on_game_ready(on_game_initialized, null). honse-debug already bypassed game-init. Build green

description: Build+clippy+test; deploy; user in-game gate: hotkeys fire,
